content.en:
"Tianyuan True Law!"

Ye Tian decided to choose this exercise, the Tianyuan True Method has a total of seven layers of exercises, practicing the first layer of exercises, although it cannot improve the life level, but it can improve the longevity of a hundred years; if you practice the second level of exercises, you can become a second-order life level; if you practice the third-level exercises, you can become a third-order life level, and if you practice the fourth level, you can become a fourth-order life level.

Once all the seven layers of the Tianyuan True Law are cultivated, one can become a seventh-order life, transcending the universe, and can be described as an immortal and immortal realm.

Previously, the third-level consummation realm of the Immortal Normalization Technique obtained by Ye Tian was equivalent to the fourth layer of the Tianyuan True Method, but it was a pity that the cultivation of the Immortal Normalization Technique was extremely incomplete, and the fourth-order life cultivated with the Immortal Normalization Technique actually had sequelae, and it would be troublesome to transfer to other life level exercises in the future.

Fortunately, Ye Tian has only now practiced to the second level, and the sequelae are not big, so he can transfer to the Tianyuan True Method.

Putting away the Tianyuan True Method, Ye Tian was in a very good mood.

At this time, the machine spirit said again: "What you just passed is only the second round of assessment of the Yuangu Palace, and there is a third round of assessment and a fourth round of assessment later. The rewards for each round of assessment are also very generous, but they are not necessarily as precious as the Tianyuan True Law, this time, I made an exception to reduce the difficulty for you, so that you can survive the anti-heaven level difficulty and obtain the Tianyuan True Law, otherwise you will never be able to obtain the Tianyuan True Law. "

Ye Tian nodded, and also understood that with his own strength, it was indeed impossible to break through the full version of the anti-heaven level difficulty.

"Let's go for the third round of assessments!"

As soon as the machine spirit's voice fell, Ye Tian found that he had been moved.

The next moment, Ye Tian found himself at the foot of a sacred mountain.

At the same time, in addition to him, there are also many god-level here, among which His Royal Highness Jun Jian of the Human Race and Daozi in the clouds are also here.

"Your Highness Wanfa, you're here!"

His Royal Highness Jun Jian and Daozi in the clouds flew over and greeted Ye Tian.

"Have you conducted the third round of assessments?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Not yet!" His Royal Highness Jun Jian shook his head, "We were still observing not long ago, but we have basically figured out the content of the third round of assessment!"

"Oh, what is it?"

Ye Tian was curious.

"It's will!" His Royal Highness Jun Jian said: "Your Highness Wanfa, please look at this sacred mountain, the sacred mountain cannot fly, you can only walk up." There are a total of 999 stone steps from the bottom of the mountain to the mountain, one stone step at a time, but it is very difficult to get to the top of the mountain, and the stone steps will bear the impact of the will in the dark, once the will is not strong, it will fail instantly, a person only has one chance, once defeated, he can no longer walk the stone steps!"

"Will, I see!"

Ye Tian nodded.

At this time, there are already some god-level people who are breaking through the third round, but they are walking very slowly, and some even take a long time to take a step, which shows the terrifying degree of will impact.

At present, the best result is His Highness Tianxuan, who is already on the 135th stone step, and is still walking up the mountain at a slow pace.

Ye Tian was delayed because he was breaking through the death-level difficulty and the anti-heaven level difficulty in a row, causing many people to break through the third round.

Of course, who comes first and who comes first does not affect the results.

"Your Highness Wanfa, we're also going to the third round!"

His Royal Highness Jun Jian and Daozi in the clouds hugged his fists.

"Let's go together!"

Ye Tiandao.

Woohoo!!

Ye Tian, His Highness Jun Jian, and Daozi in the clouds flew to the first stone step, and the moment they just stepped into the stone steps, a strong will rushed over.

The will is related to the strength of the soul and the nature of the heart, but it is not an absolute relationship, some people have a weak soul, but the will is very strong, and some people have a strong soul, but the will is very weak.

On the path of cultivation, people with strong wills are often more likely to progress, break bottlenecks, and even exert stronger combat effectiveness.

The will on the first stone step was not strong, for Ye Tian, it was just like a breeze blowing.

So, Ye Tian walked up step by step, just like ordinary people walking normally, and His Royal Highness Jun Jian and Yunzhong Daozi were also very easy to face the impact of their will at first, but after walking dozens of stone steps, they became a little dignified, and their walking speed was much slower.

50 stone steps!

60 stone steps!

70 stone steps!

80 stone steps!

Ye Tian quickly walked through 100 stone steps, ahead of other god levels, and there were not many god levels that surpassed him at the moment.

He continued to chase after him, surpassing a god-level.

Suddenly.

A god-level on the 127 stone steps screamed violently, and the whole person flew out directly upside down and fell down the mountain.

This drop is tantamount to failure, and he can no longer continue the assessment, and his results are finally fixed at the 127th stone step, and he will definitely not be able to get too good rewards.

Time passed little by little, and when Ye Tian reached the 200th stone step, he felt a little pressure, and the will in the dark was like countless sharp blades that hit his will every moment.

Ye Tian's will was as strong as his state of mind, and the impact of his will on the 200th stone step alone was obviously beyond his control.

His Highness Tianxuan is now at 253 stone steps, His Highness Blood Wind is at 246 stone steps, and there are several gods at 200 stone steps.

Next, Ye Tianyi walked through 250 stone steps, 300 stone steps, and 350 stone steps one by one.

At the time of the 400th stone steps, Ye Tian finally caught up with His Highness Tianxuan.

His Royal Highness Tianxuan noticed Ye Tian and looked over, "Your Highness Wanfa, you are also here, let's compare? In terms of strength, I am indeed inferior to you, but in terms of will, you are not necessarily stronger than me!"

"I'm sorry, I'm not interested!"

After Ye Tian finished speaking, he stepped into the 401st stone step, and then stepped into the 402nd stone step, and stepped into the two stone steps one after another, which is equivalent to facing the will impact of the two stone steps at once, which is very dangerous, and the safe way is to take it step by step and buffer it, so that the will can easily accept the impact.

"Your Highness Wanfa, don't you dare to compare?"

His Royal Highness Tianxuan shouted.

"Hmph, you catch up with me first!"

Ye Tian said contemptuously.

Then, Ye Tian exerted his speed and quickly surpassed His Highness Tianxuan several stone steps.

Seeing this, His Royal Highness Tianxuan also sped up his speed, wanting to catch up with Ye Tian, but due to the increased speed, he almost fell down because of the impact of his will, so scared that he didn't dare to chase so wildly.

"Damn, His Highness Wanfa's will is also so strong, am I really inferior to him in all aspects?"

His Royal Highness Tianxuan asked himself in a muffled voice.

The 450th stone staircase!

The 500th stone staircase!

The 550th stone staircase!

The 600th stone staircase!

When Ye Tian stepped into the 600th stone step, the pressure was also very great, and every will impact made him a little uncomfortable, even dizzy, and he needed to deal with the will impact with all his strength, otherwise it would be easy to cross the will.

On each of the next stone steps, Ye Tian walked very slowly, and he needed to rest for a long time to adjust his breath.

"According to this will increase, I estimate that it will be difficult to break through the 700th stone step, it is estimated that this is the real assessment difficulty, the previous anti-heaven level difficulty assessment is to lower the standard, otherwise I will not be able to break through. Now, the Yuan Gu Palace's instrument spirit has not lowered its standards, and it is undoubtedly impossible for me to break through the 999 stone steps. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

However, even if he couldn't walk the 999th stone steps, his current results completely crushed other god-level, and even became the dream result of other god-level.
